ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of the application (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the application */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment the application is running in (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., GQL, Rest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Unit symbol for the metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being measured */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for measurement */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source used for the measurement */,
  "metric_value_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, DevOps engineer, system administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., system, application) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric displayed on the widget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was last updated */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being monitored */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold, anomaly) */,
  "notification_channels" TEXT /* Notification channels for the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert trigger */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert trigger */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert log was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, DevOps engineer, system administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Password reset token for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user on the dashboard (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was created */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
